75275.subject: Meet The Billionaires Funding Graham Platner’s Anti-Billionaire Senate Bid
75275.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/meet-billionaires-funding-graham-platners-anti-billionaire-vam5c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2lvxp980T5iy7PJAYXlxaw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0qkDO4NH98pYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr15hw4a~cg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr15hw4a-cg
  
Good evening, Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner says billionaires should not buy elections, but his campaign filings show that at least five found the donate button anyway. His candidacy has not been without controversy, like a cheating scandal and a tattoo that resembles a Nazi emblem. Nevertheless, more billionaire money is likely to flow into Platner’s coffers as November’s election approaches. Here are the billionaires currently backing his campaign. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads KC Current The KC Current Are Ready To Expand Their Pioneering Soccer Stadium The first venue built for a pro women’s sports team has been a game-changer, and revenue could spike again with the addition of 6,500 seats. America's Best Brands For Value 2026 Which products provide the highest quality for the price? Forbes’ second-annual Best Brands for Value list explores this through a year-long survey that gathered 14 million consumer ratings of more than 2,000 brands.
Приєднатися до обговорення
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/meet-billionaires-funding-graham-platners-anti-billionaire-vam5c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B2lvxp980T5iy7PJAYXlxaw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0qkDO4NH98pYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_-null-fz96fz~mr15hw4a~cg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr15hw4a-cg
  
      

----------------------------------------

Це повідомлення е-поштою адресовано учасникові Oleh Novosadov (I am 36 years old, and I am passionate about the world of cryptocurrencies and blockchain technologies. My professional interests include investing in cryptocurrencies, exploring blockchain, Web3, and the DeFi sector.)

75274.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Visa, Stripe, Mastercard, Coinbase, BlackRock back OUSD stablecoin
75274.body:
New York Life launches tokenized fund | SEC seeks input on 'novel ETF' | analysts reevaluate Strategy | Zcash nonprofit unveils wallet recovery tool | and more

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by Daniel Kuhn | Edited by Jason Shubnell

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Tuesday! *Bitcoin* is once again trading below $60,000 as the month comes to a close, driven in part by June's net ETF outflows — the worst month on record since the spot bitcoin funds went live in 2024.

In today's newsletter, *Open Standard* stablecoin initiative launches with support from 140 orgs, *New York Life* gets into tokenization, *SEC* seeks public comment on “novel ETFs,” and more.

Meanwhile, *Sovright* , the new *Zcash* non-profit formed out of the ECC governance dispute, has unveiled a ZEC wallet recovery tool ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406731/new-zcash-nonprofit-sovright-unveils-zec-wallet-recovery-tool?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ).

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*🌐 Visa, Stripe, Coinbase and more join Open USD stablecoin that shares reserve revenue*

CZ ( https://www.theblock.co/post/406736/visa-stripe-coinbase-join-open-usd-stablecoin-shares-reserve-revenue?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Over 140 companies, including *Visa, Stripe, Mastercard, Coinbase, BlackRock, American Express, Google, Shopify, IBM, Ripple* , and others, have joined *Open Standard* to launch *Open USD* (OUSD), a new shared stablecoin expected to launch later in 2026.

* Unlike traditional single-issuer stablecoins, OUSD will be managed by an independent organization with shared governance and revenue-sharing among partner companies.
* OUSD will also distribute most earnings from its reserves to participating businesses, minus a small management fee, allowing members to earn revenue based on the stablecoin’s adoption and usage.
* Businesses can mint and redeem OUSD without fees or volume limits, positioning it as an attractive, neutral payment asset for global transactions.
* Tempo CEO Matt Huang said Open USD will be "natively issued on its network from day one," though it is as yet unclear whether the stablecoin will exclusively launch on *Tempo*.
* While there have been other collaborative stablecoin initiatives in the past, like the Glo

75269.subject: Why big AI labs are hiring so many philosophers
75269.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjN9AAcAAAAAA2HW9YQCrb7xy-odgGqCaC7hjQfmpDutgOi4SsdHFPU7KRCTuq-RbSO-A06TXeCezevu8h3lW3IHP4gVDWToT8TTqJz0nLzFVbhiPvrkZYab 

June 30th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjN9AAcAAAAAA2HW9YQDMm9MYi8LL-XKDx7MpjuqCzpBMGolGJ_Qu7Z-d0BT1IxdbCfMm7njidSpE1Vn5j1EaxkC8Xe7vs4NUNdqRUJ-Fg2rv272DBVaugCJ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjN9AAcAAAAAA2HW9YQE6-gQ96CQ7hgmqFzdJU4FBNcIaS1L27SfekqVrneQOmu-vdPlGhDkSCqHY1JxeamLXyvJbHlZr6jx_Y-OuWXHWu-opfYSCCcOfFUY 


 



Lane Greene

Senior digital editor


 
 

 Philosophy graduates have a new career path. Artificial-intelligence labs are hiring them to help build large language models. This isn’t so that you can have a Socratic chin-wag with a machine, but to make 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjN9AAcAAAAAA2HW9YQFCTg5yvZpiXAAKuUBMeAwdi0uW0DmJV8V9cMIkVav-OnoeKajv4wMNUR5mZMljL3IBvay6Q7Ckm8StFSdJEjgbm4DY_HMUF4 
AIs be ethical and safe —something needed not just in chatbots but in autonomous cars and high-tech weapons, too.


 And there are 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MjN9AAcAAAAAA2HW9YQGBNOdyC-K-YFHWPUeMhaoV_HiL-CCbrs9z085LV6RPQrlFcwadG7ZURzxgTJQ4UI604sCY6Cet1x2brhE7i4vGhwVVfsoRPs 
two visions of the Middle East  
 emerging.

75268.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 30
75268.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-30-oleh-bezuhlyi-lo8wf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BXn4nzSaITe%2B3H7eQrk1djQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1yOhCI2DsnpIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr0uvy5w~au-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr0uvy5w-au
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Risk-off tone dominates as Bitcoin slides toward its 2024 lows and traders load up on downside hedges, while a stablecoin shake-up — a new BlackRock-backed rival to Circle and the MiCA deadline hitting USDT — reshapes the regulatory map. 💵 Circle drops 13% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back a rival stablecoin Circle's shares tumbled after heavyweight backers lined up behind Open USD, a new network that lets partners keep reserve income and skip minting fees — a direct competitive threat to the USDC issuer's economics. Read full story 📉 Bitcoin nears 2024 lows as traders pay up for protection Bitcoin and ether drifted toward key support as options markets skewed defensive, with DeFi tokens taking the hardest hit amid thinning liquidity and a broader institutional pullback. More details 🏛️ CLARITY Act heads for a Senate test as banks flag volatility Jefferies warned the digital-asset market-structure bill faces steep hurdles in the Senate, cautioning that passage would accelerate institutional adoption while delays would prolong regulatory limbo for the sector. Read more 🇪🇺 Tether's $186B USDT faces removal from EU platforms With MiCA's compliance deadline arriving, USDT is set to be delisted across EU exchanges, a move expected to push trading volumes toward compliant alternatives and reshuffle European liquidity. See details 🦊 MetaMask launches a Money Account with stablecoin yield MetaMask rolled out an all-in-one Money Account offering up to 4% APY on mUSD plus card spending, part of a wider push to make stablecoins useful for everyday payments rather than just trading. Read full story 🏦 BlackRock plugs Ethena's synthetic dollar into Aladdin BlackRock integrated Ethena's synthetic dollar into its $20 trillion Aladdin platform, a notable step toward institutional acceptance of synthetic stablecoins and on-chain dollar strategies. More details ⚖️ SEC wins $5.5M judgment over a fake crypto platform The SEC secured a default judgment against the operators of NanoBit, who built trust with victims over WhatsApp before diverting funds to overseas accounts instead of executing any real trades. Read more 📩 Subscribe for tomorrow's AI-curated crypto digest — fresh every day. 🌐 cryptobeholder.com
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-30-o
